title: Weenie Hut NEO
description: Modpack that was intended to use in a server (NOW DISCONTINUED)
body:
_(NOW DISCONTINUED)_

A kitchen sink modpack with mods that are meant for me AND A SERVER to play with and to fit my ideal minecraft experience.

This modpack was uploaded to modrinth so other people can easily access and so i can easily ship modpack updates to people who play on my server (with the same name)

# **I dont own any of the projects _listed in the versions list_ or the _resourcepack / datapack list down below_, credits to all the mod creators and their amazing works!**

Hope you enjoy, may the memory of weenie hut live on.

### _**DATAPACKS / RESOURCEPACKS USED**_
- [Whaleborne Modded Planks Compatability](https://modrinth.com/datapack/whaleborne-modded-planks-compatibility)
- [Better Mob Models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-mob-models)
- [Tom's Create Storage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/toms-create-storage)
- [FTGU Modded Creepers Compat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ftgu-modded-creepers-compat)
